title: Bot Moderation
description: Manage bot moderation features and settings

setupWizard.title: Setup Your Bot
setupWizard.subtitle: Follow these steps to create and configure your multi-tenant bot

credentials.title: Enter Your Bot Token
credentials.description: Get your bot token from @BotFather on Telegram
credentials.mtprotoDescription: MTProto API setup is now separate and optional. Configure it later in Settings → MTProto Setup to enable features like:

rateLimits.title: Configure Rate Limits
rateLimits.description: Set request limits for your bot
rateLimits.rpsError: RPS must be a positive number
rateLimits.maxConcurrentError: Max concurrent must be a positive integer

verification.title: Test Your Bot
verification.description: Optional: Send a test message to verify your bot is working
verification.testMessageHelp: We'll send this message from your bot to verify it works
verification.infoTitle: Once you click "Create & Verify Bot", we will:

steps.create: Create your bot with the provided credentials

messages.alreadyConfigured: You already have a bot configured! Redirecting to dashboard...
messages.invalidToken: Invalid bot token. Please check your token from @BotFather
messages.unauthorized: Bot token unauthorized. Make sure it's a valid token from @BotFather

suspend.title: Suspend Bot
suspend.description: Are you sure you want to suspend this bot? Please provide a reason.
suspend.reasonHelp: This will be shown to the user
suspend.reasonError: Suspension reason must be at least 5 characters

rateLimits.title: Update Rate Limits
rateLimits.description: Adjust the rate limits for this bot

settings.title: Moderation Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure bot moderation features for your group

cleanJoinMessages.title: Clean Join Messages
cleanJoinMessages.description: Automatically delete system messages when users join
cleanJoinMessages.delayHelp: How long to wait before deleting the message

cleanLeaveMessages.title: Clean Leave Messages
cleanLeaveMessages.description: Automatically delete system messages when users leave

welcomeMessages.title: Welcome Messages
welcomeMessages.description: Send custom welcome messages to new members

inviteTracking.title: Invite Tracking
inviteTracking.description: Track who invited new members to your group

welcome.title: Welcome Message Configuration
welcome.enableFirst: Enable it in the Settings tab first.

message.label: Welcome Message
message.help: Use {{mention}} for user mention, {{username}} for username

preview.title: Preview
preview.noPreview: Configure a message to see preview

inviteTracking.title: Invite Tracking
inviteTracking.enableFirst: Enable it in the Settings tab first.
